{"score": 5.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:A/VC:L/VI:L/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-601", "name": "URL Redirection to Untrusted Site ('Open Redirect')"}], "description": "## Affected Version

JupyterHub <= 5.4.3

## Impact

An open redirect vulnerability in JupyterHub <=5.4.3 allows attackers to construct links which, when clicked, take users to the JupyterHub login page, after which they are sent to an arbitrary attacker-controlled site outside JupyterHub instead of a JupyterHub page, bypassing JupyterHub's check to prevent this.

## Patches

Upgrade to JupyterHub 5.4.4

## Workarounds

A deployment can apply filters on the Location header in a reverse proxy such as nginx/apache/traefik.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00224, "percentile": 0.12841}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-3vff-hjqv-m7h8", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-03T21:36:07Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-3vff-hjqv-m7h8", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-3vff-hjqv-m7h8"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-33709"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-03T22:16:26Z", "published_at": "2026-04-03T21:36:07Z", "references": ["https://github.com/jupyterhub/jupyterhub/security/advisories/GHSA-3vff-hjqv-m7h8", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-33709", "https://github.com/jupyterhub/jupyterhub/releases/tag/5.4.4", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-3vff-hjqv-m7h8"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/jupyterhub/jupyterhub/security-advisories/GHSA-3vff-hjqv-m7h8", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/jupyterhub/jupyterhub", "summary": "JupyterHub has an Open Redirect Vulnerability", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-04-27T16:19:31Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-3vff-hjqv-m7h8", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "5.4.4", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "jupyterhub"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 5.4.3"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: JupyterHub has an Open Redirect Vulnerability
